note: Phase I baseline environment manifest for weighted_lse_dp experiments. Records Python interpreter, platform, and installed package versions as captured at project setup. This manifest is referenced by Phase I spec §4.1 and pinned to the git SHA below for reproducibility.

venv.note: torch==2.6.0 is the pinned version for Python 3.13 (cp313) environments in this repo. torch==2.5.1 was initially considered but provides no cp313 wheels and is not the correct pin.
